ocr: • Read and follow all labels and the Owner's Manual carefully
before installing, operating, or servicing unit. Read the safety
information at the beginning of the manual and in each section.

atomic_facts.fact: The pressure gauge needle is pointing to the white zone, indicating a low reading near 0 inches W.C.
Text below the gauge recommends cleaning at 3 in. W.C. and requires it at 4 in. W.C.
The gauge is labeled 'FILTER CLEANING GAUGE' with an arrow pointing down.
The blue button is labeled 'CLEANING CYCLE' with a smaller 'CLEANING' label and icon below it.
Warning labels are present in English, French ('AVERTISSEMENT'), and Spanish ('ADVERTENCIA').

ocr: Replace filter if above 4 in. w.c. after cleaning.
Remplacez le filtre si la pression est supérieure à 4 pouces C.E. après le nettoyage.
Cámbiese el filtro si está por encima de 4 pulgadas de columna de agua de cap. después de la limpieza.
